audit_items.proof_trace: AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() can return NULL on memory allocation failure, but result is used directly at line 511 via GetRandomSecretKey(random_info[0]) without NULL check. GetRandomSecretKey() accesses random_info->secret_key causing NULL pointer dereference.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers memory allocation failure (e.g., via large image processing), causing AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() to return NULL, leading to crash when GetRandomSecretKey() dereferences NULL pointer at line 511.
